name: qobuz
title: Qobuz
description: Search Qobuz, see what's playing, and manage your favourites and playlists — open anything straight in the Qobuz app.
author: kud

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search
commands.subtitle: Qobuz
commands.description: Search Qobuz for albums, artists, and tracks.

commands.name: convert-link
commands.title: Convert Track Link
commands.subtitle: Qobuz
commands.description: Copy a Spotify, YouTube Music, or Qobuz track link, then run this to convert it to the other services.

commands.name: now-playing
commands.title: Now Playing
commands.subtitle: Qobuz
commands.description: Show the track currently playing in the Qobuz desktop app and copy its link.

preferences.name: titleLength
preferences.title: Title Length
preferences.description: Maximum characters shown in the menu bar before truncating.

commands.name: favourites
commands.title: Favourites
commands.subtitle: Qobuz
commands.description: Browse your favourite albums, artists, and tracks.

commands.name: play
commands.title: Play / Pause
commands.subtitle: Qobuz
commands.description: Toggle play/pause in the Qobuz desktop app.

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Qobuz Token
preferences.description: Your Qobuz user_auth_token (X-User-Auth-Token header from a www.qobuz.com/api.json request). Leave empty to reuse the token from the Qobuz CLI's Keychain entry.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
